title: biscutella incana
intro: Biscutella incana, also known as the hoary biscutella, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, due to its high levels of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Biscutella incana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to support digestive and immune system health.
